input.background: We wish to detect a mean difference of 0.25 for a variable that has a standard deviation of 0.67.
input.question: How large a sample is needed to detect this mean differences with 90% power at alpha=0.05 (two-sided)?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

mean_difference.description: The mean difference we wish to detect.

standard_deviation.description: The standard deviation of the variable.

power.description: The statistical power desired for the test.

alpha.description: The significance level for the two-sided test.

sample_size.description: The sample size needed to detect the mean difference with the specified power and alpha.
